steps.name: idempotency-key-contract
steps.summary: Publish job keys now deterministically bind job_type, post_version_id, and content_hash. PostgreSQL persistence returns the existing job for duplicate logical requests while changed versions or content hashes create distinct keys.

steps.name: persistent-job-lock-and-retry-stop
steps.summary: PostgreSQL-backed five-minute job leases now allow only the current lease owner to finish a job, reclaim expired work safely, and stop retryable stages after the same failure repeats twice with a durable usage_events row and operator-alert result.
